chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-60 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.276/2024. 3. For haring of main case. 02.10.2025 Mr. Malik Naeem Iqbal, advocate for the respondents No.5 to 19. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- This case was last taken up on 15.05.2024, which is almost one and a half years ago. Today, none present for the petitioners without intimation. It appears that petitioners have lost interest to pursue this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
